photo1_sky_point.composition: High-contrast action shot. Looking up towards the heavens with his glove raised, holding his red helmet and bat close to his chest.
photo1_sky_point.bestCrop: Container mode (object-contain) to prevent cropping his head or bat.
photo1_sky_point.bestLayout: 65-70% Left Image Panel / 30-35% Right Text Panel

photo2_bat_point.emotion: Confidence, dominance, supreme composure, victorious smile
photo2_bat_point.composition: Intimate front-facing medium shot. The bat points straight at the camera with Virat's smiling face in background.
photo2_bat_point.bestCrop: Container mode (object-contain) to capture both the bat tip and Virat's full eyes & smile.
photo2_bat_point.bestLayout: 65-70% Left Image Panel / 30-35% Right Text Panel

photo3_peak_2016.match: RCB Chapter III (2016 Green Jersey Peak)
photo3_peak_2016.emotion: Pure peak athletic triumph, roaring satisfaction, double fist pump, orange cap authority
photo3_peak_2016.composition: Featured movie poster framing. Virat in RCB green jersey raising his bat high in his right hand, helmet in left, looking forward with focus.
photo3_peak_2016.facePosition: Center, looking forward with a triumphant expression.
photo3_peak_2016.bestCrop: Container mode (object-contain) to show the full jersey sponsor, bat brand, and his face.
photo3_peak_2016.bestLayout: 65-70% Left Image Panel / 30-35% Right Text Panel

photo4_breakthrough_2025.match: RCB Chapter IV (2025 Champions with ABD & Gayle)
photo4_breakthrough_2025.emotion: Release of 17 years of tension, breakthrough, franchise union, unbridled joy
photo4_breakthrough_2025.composition: Vibrant floodlight shot. Unites Virat, ABD, and Chris Gayle raising the trophy together under gold confetti.
photo4_breakthrough_2025.facePosition: Center-left (Virat next to ABD and Gayle).
photo4_breakthrough_2025.bestCrop: Container mode (object-contain) to keep all three legends and the trophy fully in the frame.
photo4_breakthrough_2025.bestLayout: 65-70% Left Image Panel / 30-35% Right Text Panel

photo5_defending_2026.match: RCB Chapter V (2026 Team Champions on Grass)
photo5_defending_2026.emotion: Elation, completions, double-crown confidence, playful peace sign
photo5_defending_2026.composition: Wide documentary outfield shot. Virat lies on the grass with the IPL trophy flashing a peace sign, team celebrating behind.
photo5_defending_2026.bestCrop: Container mode (object-contain) to prevent cropping Virat on the grass or teammates behind.

photo6_finale_kiss.emotion: Serenity, peace, fulfillment, ultimate gratitude, worth the wait
photo6_finale_kiss.composition: High-contrast close-up profile. Smooth lighting reflecting off the silver trophy as Virat kisses it with closed eyes.
